title: campanula balcanica subvar. bulgarica
intro: Campanula balcanica subvar. bulgarica, also known as Balkan bellflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing several health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, digestive problems, and fever. Herbal preparations of Campanula balcanica subvar. bulgarica can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
